disclosures.name: Reporting organization profile
disclosures.description: Provide company identification including name, ticker, ISIN, and primary activities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Provide a general description and data about your organization, reporting year, and ISIC activity codes.

disclosures.name: Board-level oversight of climate-related issues
disclosures.description: Provide details on the board's oversight of climate-related issues.
disclosures.guidanceText: Identify the position(s) or committee(s) on the board with responsibility for climate-related issues.

disclosures.name: Management-level responsibility for climate-related issues
disclosures.description: Describe management-level positions or committees with responsibility for climate-related issues.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the management-level position(s) or committee(s) with responsibility for climate-related issues and their reporting lines.

disclosures.name: Incentives for management of climate-related issues
disclosures.description: Provide details of the incentives for management of climate-related issues.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe whether climate-related performance is linked to compensation/incentive schemes.

disclosures.name: Climate-related risk identification process
disclosures.description: Describe the process for identifying, assessing and responding to climate-related risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the process used to determine which risks and opportunities could have a substantive financial or strategic impact.

disclosures.name: Climate-related risks with substantive financial or strategic impact
disclosures.description: Provide details of risks identified with the potential to have a substantive financial or strategic impact.

requiredMetrics.name: Financial impact of identified risks
requiredMetrics.description: Estimated financial impact of climate risks

disclosures.guidanceText: For each risk, provide the risk type, primary climate-related risk driver, geographic area, time horizon, likelihood, magnitude of impact, and financial impact figure.

disclosures.name: Transition plan
disclosures.description: Describe whether the organization has a climate transition plan that aligns with a 1.5C world.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe whether and how the organization has a transition plan to align operations and business model with a 1.5C world.

disclosures.name: Scenario analysis
disclosures.description: Provide details of the climate-related scenario analysis conducted.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the climate-related scenarios used, time horizon, geographic coverage, and results including business impacts.

disclosures.name: Financial planning influence
disclosures.description: Describe where in the organization's financial planning climate-related issues are integrated.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe where and how climate-related issues are integrated into the organization's financial planning.

disclosures.name: Emission reduction targets
disclosures.description: Provide details of emission reduction targets currently in force.
disclosures.guidanceText: For each active target, provide scope, target type (absolute/intensity), base year, start year, target year, base year emissions, and progress to date.

disclosures.name: Emission reduction initiatives
disclosures.description: Provide details of emission reduction initiatives active during the reporting year.

requiredMetrics.name: Annual CO2e savings
requiredMetrics.description: Annual metric tons CO2e savings from initiatives

disclosures.guidanceText: For each initiative, provide the activity type, description, annual CO2e savings, annual monetary savings, investment required, and payback period.

disclosures.name: Emissions calculation methodology
disclosures.description: Provide the base year and base year emissions, and describe the methodology used.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the base year, base year emissions, and the methodology used including GHG Protocol standards applied and emission factors used.

disclosures.name: Scope 1 emissions data
disclosures.description: Total gross global Scope 1 emissions in metric tons CO2e.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report total gross global Scope 1 emissions in metric tons CO2e for the reporting year.

disclosures.name: Scope 2 emissions data
disclosures.description: Total gross global Scope 2 emissions (location-based and market-based) in metric tons CO2e.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report gross global Scope 2 emissions in metric tons CO2e, both location-based and market-based where applicable.

disclosures.name: Scope 3 emissions data
disclosures.description: Total gross global Scope 3 emissions by category in metric tons CO2e.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report Scope 3 emissions for each relevant category. Identify the categories evaluated and the methodology used.

disclosures.name: Emissions by country/region
disclosures.description: Break down gross Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions by country/area/region.
disclosures.guidanceText: Break down Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions by country/region where the organization operates.

disclosures.name: Energy consumption and mix
disclosures.description: Report total energy consumption and breakdown by fuel type and activity.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total fuel, electricity, heating, cooling, and steam consumption, broken down by renewable and non-renewable sources.

disclosures.name: Emissions performance
disclosures.description: Year-over-year change in total Scope 1 and 2 emissions.

requiredMetrics.name: YoY change Scope 1+2
requiredMetrics.description: Year-over-year percentage change in total Scope 1+2 emissions

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the year-over-year change in emissions and the reason for any significant changes.

disclosures.name: Carbon credits
disclosures.description: Details of any project-based carbon credits cancelled during the reporting year.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report details of any carbon credits cancelled/retired including project type, standard, and vintage.

disclosures.name: Internal carbon pricing
disclosures.description: Details of the internal carbon price used by the organization.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the internal carbon price and how it is used in decision-making.

disclosures.name: Value chain engagement
disclosures.description: Details of climate-related engagement strategy with suppliers and customers.

requiredMetrics.name: Suppliers engaged on climate
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of suppliers engaged on climate issues

disclosures.guidanceText: Describe climate-related engagement activities with suppliers, customers, and other value chain partners.

disclosures.name: Verification/assurance
disclosures.description: Whether the organization has had any of the reported emissions data externally verified/assured.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the scope of emissions data that has been third-party verified and the assurance level (limited/reasonable).
